briefdescription.para: Take page with extracted lines and bboxes and determine line type as bold, italic, text alignment and so on Image should be rotated properly, it can be in grayscale or rgb.

parameterdescription.para: page with extracted lines (this can be done with tesseract)
need or not predict bold classifier

briefdescription.para: returns coordinates of left bound of the texts Algorithms: find the most two frequent left bounds and take the most left from them.
determines the font size by the bbox size, return font size in typography point https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Point_(typography) we assume that page in A4 format and pt is equal 0.353 mm

parameterdescription.para: height of the image in pixels

detaileddescription.para:
Assume that lines are in the proper order. This method work in place
lines
list of line with meta
:
